rss1 Codebook

2026-05-28

Source: vignettes/rss1_codebook.Rmd
rss1_codebook.Rmd
rss1 (7599 rows and 173 variables, 173 shown)
ID Name Label Type Missings Values N

Good 2976 (39.2%)
Fair 1015 (13.4%)
Poor 172 (2.3%)
